subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy spirit in service to the Cause of God! Praise be unto God, thy services at the threshold of the Abhá Beauty are acceptable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من بذل الروح فی خدمه امرالله الحمد لله خدماتت در درگاه جمال ابهی مقبول و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
